title: Error Handling and Retry
description: Connector handles retriable and non-retriable errors, manages retry policy
use_cases: Classify error as retriable (IOException, SQLException - except code 1236)
Classify error as non-retriable (SQL error 1236: ER_MASTER_FATAL_ERROR_READING_BINLOG)
Apply custom retriable exception regex (CUSTOM_RETRIABLE_EXCEPTION config)
Track retry count against maxRetries (errors.max.retries config)
Reset retry counter on successful poll with change records
Propagate retry count from replaced ErrorHandler on restart
Handle heartbeat SQL errors (42000, 3D000 => fatal DebeziumException)
Warn on missing/purged binlog files at startup
key_relationships: BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler implements HeartbeatErrorHandler (inner class of BinlogSourceTask)
ChangeEventSourceCoordinator holds ErrorHandler; calls setProducerThrowable(e) on Throwable
RetryingCallable is a standalone retry wrapper using DelayStrategy, catches RetriableException
error_classification_logic: ErrorHandler.isRetriable(): walks cause chain, matches communicationExceptions() set (default: IOException only)
MySqlErrorHandler/MariaDbErrorHandler override isRetriable(): if SQLException.errorCode==1236 → false (non-retriable); else delegates to super
ErrorHandler.isCustomRetriable(): checks throwable message chain against regex in config 'custom.retriable.exception'
BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler.onError(): SQL state 42000 or 3D000 → throw DebeziumException (fatal); others → ignored

retry_policy.behavior: retriable + hasMoreRetries() → RetriableException (connector restart); else ConnectException (connector stop)
retry_policy.counter_propagation: replacedErrorHandler.getRetries() copied on construction to carry over count across restarts
retry_policy.counter_reset: BaseSourceTask.resetErrorHandlerRetriesIfNeeded() resets retries to 0 after successful poll with change records

key_method_signatures: ErrorHandler.isRetriable(Throwable): boolean - virtual, override in subclasses
ErrorHandler.isCustomRetriable(Throwable): boolean - regex match on message chain
ErrorHandler.hasMoreRetries(): boolean - increments retries, checks vs maxRetries
RetryingCallable.call(): V - retry loop catching RetriableException with DelayStrategy
BinlogSourceTask.validateBinlogConfiguration(Snapshotter, BinlogConnectorConnection): void - throws DebeziumException if misconfigured
flow_summary: 1. Producer thread throws Throwable → ChangeEventSourceCoordinator catches → errorHandler.setProducerThrowable(e)
2. ErrorHandler: first=CAS null→e; check isRetriable(e) → check isCustomRetriable(e)
3. If retriable AND hasMoreRetries(): queue.producerException(RetriableException) → Kafka Connect restarts task
4. If not retriable OR no retries left: queue.producerException(ConnectException) → task stops
5. On restart: new ErrorHandler receives replacedErrorHandler to preserve retry count
6. After successful poll with records: BaseSourceTask.resetErrorHandlerRetriesIfNeeded() resets counter to 0
7. Heartbeat SQL errors: BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler classifies 42000/3D000 as fatal, others as ignorable
important_notes: MySqlErrorHandler and MariaDbErrorHandler are structurally identical (same NON_RETRIABLE_ERROR_CODES set {1236}, same communicationExceptions). RetryingCallable is an embedded-engine-level retry (not connector pipeline retry). HeartbeatErrorHandler is a functional interface with DEFAULT_NOOP_ERRORHANDLER default.
